name: @falsafa/site
description: Falsafa reading site — Astro 5, editorial typography, watercolor covers, polymorphic chapter renderer (prose / verse / manuscript).

scripts.predev: bun run scripts/prepare-covers.ts && bun run scripts/prepare-corpus.ts && bun run scripts/build-paragraph-index.ts
scripts.prebuild: bun run scripts/prepare-covers.ts && bun run scripts/prepare-corpus.ts && bun run scripts/build-paragraph-index.ts
scripts.search:build: astro build && pagefind --site dist && rm -rf public/pagefind && cp -r dist/pagefind public/pagefind
